title: What if Seele hadnt given Kaworu Tabris a human body
display_title: What if Seele hadnt given Kaworu Tabris a human body
wikitext:
[]: What if Seele hadn't given Kaworu/Tabris a human body?             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Dec 31, 2009 10:38 am Quite frankly how do you think the series would have developed changed if SEELE hadn't captured Tabris and given him a human body as Kaworu? (Actually correct me if Im wrong but just to be on the safe side put adam into that sentence or replace Tabris with adam )

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Dec 31, 2009 10:59 am He could still be dangerous but give Shinji a mind rape experience like Asuka or pleasant mind rape experience. EoE may play out a little differently in who Shinji sees as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Dec 31, 2009 11:31 am Well seeing as the Angels can form how ever they want, it may have happen just about the same way.

[]: Re: What if Seele hadn't given Kaworu/Tabris a human body?             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Thu Dec 31, 2009 11:39 am Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Quite frankly how do you think the series would have developed changed if SEELE hadn't captured Tabris and given him a human body as Kaworu? (Actually correct me if Im wrong but just to be on the safe side put adam into that sentence or replace Tabris with adam )

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Dec 31, 2009 12:23 pm I seriously doubt that Kaworu and Rei I were capable of transforming themselves in those Lilin bodies of theirs. Even if they were made of PWM, they weren't able to do it. Not that it made any difference to their ATF strength. Seele didn't "give" Kaworu his body, unless he's, like Rei 2, a copy of the body Kaworu was originally in. As far as we know, he has the same body that was created as a result of the contact experiment in Antarctica. If they hadn't given him a Lilin body, and gave him an Angel body instead? Or maybe an MP Eva body? That would make another copy of the monster that caused 2I.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Thu Dec 31, 2009 2:11 pm I believe Kaworu, like Rei, have human bodies due to their coming into existence through contact experiments. It wasn't a choice of anyone. Since Kaworu having a human body serves a story need, it's hard to imagine him in any other form. I guess if he were just another random agnel, we'd have one additional random angel battle, and then Instrumentality - and GNR wouldn't have a GNK.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Dec 31, 2009 2:23 pm Actually, it's not a question of not needing GNK, it's a question of lacking GNK, which means that Shinji would not have let down his AT Field willingly, which means that perhaps Giant Naked Idiot Rei might have hesitated and Megalomommy might not have gotten her wish to have 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Dec 31, 2009 2:40 pm Kaworu's creation came from a result of a contact experiment that contaminated Adam with human DNA, which she expluged as Kaworu when she pretty much failed to cause Second Impact. No Kaworu means no Contact Experiment, which means either A) no waking up Adam at all, continue life as normal, or B) Adam wakes up, but no contamination, so Second Impact kills every human, animal, plant, bacteria, and life form so that Adam can populate the planet with Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Thu Dec 31, 2009 3:21 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Kaworu's creation came from a result of a contact experiment that contaminated Adam with human DNA, which she expluged as Kaworu when she pretty much failed to cause Second Impact. No Kaworu means no Contact Experiment, which means either A) no waking up Adam at all, continue life as normal, or B) Adam wakes up, but no contamination, so Second Impact kills every human, animal, plant, bacteria, and life form so that Adam can populate the planet with Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Dec 31, 2009 6:32 pm When in such a fanwanking state of mind, I tend to picture a non-Kaworu Tabris as the Daimay angel, with the MPEs based on it.
